title: Peritassa campestris
taxonomy: Peritassa campestris is classified in the family Annonaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. This family is a part of the larger order Magnoliales, which consists of flowering plants that are often aromatic and have distinctive flowers. The classification of Peritassa campestris reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants. Within the Annonaceae family, Peritassa campestris is a unique species with distinct characteristics.
